claimText: Mean feather cort differed significantly among the samples from Laysan-Historical, Laysan-Contemporary, Midway and Kure (figure 2; $F_{3,35} = 7.285$, $p < 0.001$).
Mean feather cort concentrations were statistically significantly lower in Laysan-Historical samples compared with Laysan-Contemporary samples.
metrics: Laysan-Historical: $\bar{X} \pm s.d.: 5.62 \pm 2.14 \text{ pg mg}^{-1}$ ($p < 0.05$) vs Laysan-Contemporary: $\bar{X} \pm s.d.: 9.61 \pm 4.31 \text{ pg mg}^{-1}$

claimText: Mean feather cort concentrations were statistically significantly lower in Midway samples compared with Laysan-Contemporary samples.
metrics: Midway: $\bar{X} \pm s.d.: 4.70 \pm 2.38 \text{ pg mg}^{-1}$ ($p < 0.01$) vs Laysan-Contemporary: $\bar{X} \pm s.d.: 9.61 \pm 4.31 \text{ pg mg}^{-1}$

claimText: Mean feather cort concentrations were statistically significantly lower in Kure samples compared with Laysan-Contemporary samples.
metrics: Kure: $\bar{X} \pm s.d.: 3.60 \pm 2.24 \text{ pg mg}^{-1}$ ($p < 0.001$) vs Laysan-Contemporary: $\bar{X} \pm s.d.: 9.61 \pm 4.31 \text{ pg mg}^{-1}$

claimText: Mean feather cort concentrations in Midway samples were not statistically significantly different from Kure samples.
Mean feather cort concentrations in Midway samples were not statistically significantly different from Laysan-Historical samples.
Mean feather cort was significantly lower in Kure samples than in historical Laysan samples.
metrics: Kure: $\bar{X} \pm s.d.: 3.60 \pm 2.24 \text{ pg mg}^{-1}$ vs Laysan-Historical: $\bar{X} \pm s.d.: 5.62 \pm 2.14 \text{ pg mg}^{-1}$ ($p < 0.05$)
